title: (English) 你好不好 How have you been?

lines.raw: 你好不好 How Have You Been?

lines.raw: 周興哲 Eric Zhou
lines.pinyin: Eric Zhou

lines.raw: (English Cover by JTV Scarlet Avenue)
lines.pinyin: English Cover by JTV Scarlet Avenue)

lines.raw: How are you? It has been a long time
lines.pinyin: How are you? It has been a long time

lines.raw: I hope that you are doing fine
lines.pinyin: I hope that you are doing fine

lines.raw: It’s you, that I miss all this while
lines.pinyin: It’s you, that I miss all this while

lines.raw: Feels like a never ending trial
